name: Time Interconnect Technology Limited
summary: Time Interconnect Technology Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells cable assembly products in the People's Republic of China, the United States, the Netherlands, Hong Kong, and internationally. The company offers copper and optical fiber cable assemblies; and manufactures and trades in robotic products. It serves customers in the telecommunication, data center, and industrial and medical equipment sectors. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Shatin, Hong Kong. Time Interconnect Technology Limited is a subsidiary of Time Interconnect Holdings Limited.
